M1620_BWL_INCONT M1620 (M0540) Bowel Incontinence Frequency This field indicates the frequency of bowel incontinence. 00 = Very rarely or never has bowel incontinence
01 = Less than once weekly
02 = One to three times weekly
03 = Four to six times weekly
04 = On a daily basis
05 = More often than once daily
NA = NA - Patient has ostomy for bowel elimination
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x x x x x
